channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. What is Pokopia? Inside the calming Pokémon game that ditches battles for gardening  The Guardian
  3. Shigeru Ohmori Explained Pokemon Pokopia Origins  siliconera.com
  4. Pokémon Pokopia's secret weapon? Dragon Quest Builders 2 creatives who decided they could "contribute" to Game Freak's original idea  Eurogamer
  5. Pokopia: Game Freak on how Ruby and Sapphire inspired Pokémon’s biggest ever spin-off  Video Games Chronicle

item.title: Google shares how Android 17 is making everything run smoother - Android Authority
item.description:

  3. Google sets accelerated Android 17 release schedule  9to5Google

  5. Android 17 Beta 1 brings two small but useful Pixel Launcher UI changes  Android Central

item.description:

item.title: Dead or Alive 6: Last Round will not include Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond nor crossplay or upgrades for existing owners - EventHubs

item.title: GameHub will give Mac owners another imperfect way to play Windows games - Ars Technica
item.description:
